name: 37 Trotters Lane
description: Come play pickleball at 37 Trotters Lane in West Tisbury, MA! There is 1 outdoor court. The lines are permanent, but you'll need to bring your own net. The court is free.

name: Airport Fitness
description: Airport Fitness is a place to play pickleball in West Tisbury, MA. There are 2 indoor asphalt and concrete courts. The lines are permanent, and portable nets are available. Amenities include locker rooms, restrooms, water, youth programming, lights, trainers or lessons, wheelchair accessibility, and adaptive programming. The courts are private. The courts can be reserved.

name: Chappaquiddick Community Center
description: Chappaquiddick Community Center is one of the most popular places to play pickleball in Edgartown, MA. There are 2 outdoor hard courts. The lines are permanent, but you'll need to bring your own net. The courts are private.

name: Edgartown Yacht Club
description: Edgartown Yacht Club is a place to play pickleball in Edgartown, MA. There are 4 outdoor asphalt courts. These are dedicated courts with permanent lines and nets. Players have access to restrooms and water. A membership is required to play.

name: Lake Street Park
description: Come play pickleball at Lake Street Park in Tisbury, MA! There are 3 outdoor hard courts. The lines are permanent, and portable nets are available. The courts can be reserved. The courts are free.

name: Niantic Park
description:
There are 5 dedicated courts, 3 are exclusively lined for pickleball, and 4 share tennis lines.
Bathrooms are open seasonally.
open_play_schedule: Beginner & Advanced beginner lessons Tues & Thurs from 8-10 am. FREE but please be on time at 8.

name: Robinson Road Recreational Area
description: Two courts painted on an old tennis court. Courts are a bit dilapidated, but the Town of Edgartown is building 6 new permanent pickleball courts with permanent lines.

name: Vineyard Family Tennis
description: Vineyard Family Tennis is one of the most popular places to play pickleball in Oak Bluffs, MA. There is 1 outdoor hard court. This is a dedicated court with a permanent net and lines. Players have access to food, locker rooms, restrooms, water, youth programming, a pro shop or equipment store, trainers or lessons, and wheelchair accessibility. Reservations are available. The court is private.
open_play_schedule: Lessons, clinics and open play options from beginners to advanced players, with a speciality focus on juniors.
fees: Private — Membership is FREE, but need to have an account on Court Reserve.
